rows.label: qev027003_MSG0001
rows.name: Huh? A familiar face, jan? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027003_MSG0002
rows.name: Oh wait, it's the BLADE I asked to beat up the mystery enemy, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027003_MSG0003
rows.name: I'm not bragging, but I remembered, dawayo. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027003_MSG0004
rows.name: And? Did you go and beat up the guy who shot me, dawayo? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027003_MSG0005
rows.name:
...Hmm?
Hmmmmm? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027003_MSG0006
rows.name:
That face... that's the face of someone about to say something bad, jan?
I'm sensitive to those kinds of things, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027003_MSG0007
rows.name: I can hardly believe it, but you let them get away, jan? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027003_MSG0008
rows.name:
What are you doing, jan!
Chase after them immediately, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027003_MSG0009
rows.name:
Now, now...
Since you came back here, it probably means
you couldn't catch their trail after that, dawayo. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027003_MSG0010
rows.name:
When you run out of clues, return to the initial scene.
...That's the basics of investigation, dawayo. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027003_MSG0011
rows.name:
It's true, the enemy investigation is back to square one, jan.
We need to think of a way to figure out their whereabouts, jan. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027003_MSG0012
rows.name:
Hey, hey, don't just space out.
You think of a good idea too, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027003_JNK0010
rows.name: Steady Investigation[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027003_SEL0011
rows.name: Gather information.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027003_JNK0020
rows.name: Try a Bright Idea[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027003_SEL0021
rows.name: Risk it all on an all-or-nothing gamble.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027003_MSG0013
rows.name:
Well, since we don't have any clues,
gathering information is the obvious choice, jan. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027003_MSG0014
rows.name: But it's plain, jan. It seems like it'll take time, jan. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027003_MSG0015
rows.name:
More haste, less speed, dawayo.
Even if it takes time, it's a much better move than making fruitless efforts, dawayo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027003_MSG0016
rows.name: Then going to the city to ask around would be good, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027003_MSG0017
rows.name:
If the opponent is Growth and they're carrying suitable weapons,
you're more likely to get all sorts of information in the city, jan. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027003_MSG0018
rows.name:
In any case,
my mind won't be able to rest like this, dawayo. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027003_MSG0019
rows.name: I want you to resolve this as quickly as possible, dawayo. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027003_MSG0020
rows.name:
I vehemently agree with that, jan!
For the sake of the Ma-non's future too,
I want you to do your best, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027003_MSG0021
rows.name: We're cheering you on, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027003_MSG0022
rows.name:
A bright idea...?
You mean to try an all-or-nothing gamble, jan? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027003_MSG0023
rows.name: Sounds interesting, jan! What kind of method is it, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027003_MSG0024
rows.name: I'm interested too, dawayo. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027003_MSG0026
rows.name:
In other words, you recreate the exact same situation as when we were attacked
and lure them out, jan? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027003_MSG0027
rows.name:
When you run out of clues, return to the beginning...
That's putting it into practice, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027003_MSG0028
rows.name:
Eh...?
I want you to explain what that means, dawayo. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027003_MSG0029
rows.name:
It means Heradot just needs to stand in a conspicuous spot on top of the spaceship once again
and wait for the enemy to target her, jan. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027003_MSG0030
rows.name: Eeeeeeeh!? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027003_MSG0031
rows.name:
And when she gets shot again,
this time we properly confirm the direction the shot came from
and investigate that area, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027003_MSG0032
rows.name: This is definitely a bright idea, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027003_MSG0033
rows.name:
W-Wait just a minute, dawayo!
I have to get shot again, dawayo? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027003_MSG0034
rows.name:
Why, dawayo! If I get shot this time,
I might really die, dawayo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027003_MSG0035
rows.name:
No need to worry about that, jan!
Heradot has high physical capabilities, even among Ma-non, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027003_MSG0036
rows.name:
In fact, the fact that you were shot once and are still full of energy like this
is the best proof of that, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027003_MSG0037
rows.name:
It's fine, jan! No problem, jan!
Have some confidence, jaaan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027003_MSG0038
rows.name:
W-Well, if you put it that way, I don't feel bad about it,
and I can't really refuse, dawayo... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027003_MSG0039
rows.name:
It's decided, jan!
Commencing operation, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027003_MSG0040
rows.name:
Heradot! If you're that resolved,
get on top of the spaceship before you change your mind, jan.
Go get targeted loud and proud, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027003_MSG0041
rows.name:
Somehow... I feel like I'm being tricked
or deceived, dawayo... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027003_MSG0042
rows.name: I curse my own personality for getting carried away so easily, dawayo... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027003_MSG0043
rows.name: Heradot! Hurry up, hurry up! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027003_MSG0044
rows.name:
Ah-! I know, dawayo!
Just wait a second, dawayo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027003_MSG0045
rows.name: I'm up here, dawayoooo. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027003_MSG0046
rows.name:
Okay, okay, okay, jan!
Then just stand by until you get shot... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027003_MSG0047
rows.name:
Heradot!
...Are you okay, jan? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027003_MSG0048
rows.name:
......
......Of course I am, dawayo.
Don't underestimate my reflexes, dawayo. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027003_MSG0049
rows.name: I saw it clearly this time, dawayo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027003_MSG0050
rows.name:
The shot came from the northwest!
I bet the enemy is hiding out in the Bedrock Fortress, dawayo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027003_MSG0051
rows.name:
Well done, jan! I knew you could do it, jan!
Now we'll be able to apprehend them for sure, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027003_MSG0052
rows.name:
What are you waiting for, jan!
The enemy is near the Bedrock Fortress, jan!
Hurry, jan! [ST:wait ]
